source_pr.title: statistics: add better API and better logs for lock stats
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/46351

See https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46768#discussion_r1327064524

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

- Changed the `tids` to `tidAndNames` to make the relationship more explicit.
- Printed all table names.
- Stabilized the warning message.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

analysis:
PR title: statistics: add better API and better logs for lock stats
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/47024
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: - Stabilized the warning message.
Changed files (13): executor/lockstats/BUILD.bazel, executor/lockstats/lock_stats_executor.go, executor/lockstats/lock_stats_executor_test.go, executor/lockstats/unlock_stats_executor.go, statistics/handle/handletest/lockstats/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/lockstats/lock_partition_stats_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/lockstats/lock_table_stats_test.go, statistics/handle/lock_stats_handler.go, statistics/handle/lockstats/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/lockstats/lock_stats.go, statistics/handle/lockstats/lock_stats_test.go, statistics/handle/lockstats/unlock_stats.go, statistics/handle/lockstats/unlock_stats_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
